name: Ammunition, +1, +2, or +3
description: You have a bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this piece of magic ammunition. The bonus is determined by the rarity of the ammunition. Once it hits a target, the ammunition is no longer magical.

variants.value: 50 GP (per piece), equivalent to potion of same rarity
200 GP (per piece), equivalent to potion of same rarity
2000 GP (per piece), equivalent to potion of same rarity

activation.description: The magic functions automatically when used

equivalence: Ten pieces equivalent in value to a potion of the same rarity
notes: Magic ammunition loses its properties after successfully hitting a target. Purchase or create in batches.
